title: A New Era Begins After Wano
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Nami, Marines, Unknown person #8, Yamato, Sabo as Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.
scene: Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well, I joined this crew willingly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so I can't exactly say it's not my problem!! I sure picked a troublesome captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you gotta be pirate King to even make that possible,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'd better find that last lode poneglyph...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then it's off to laugh tale!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You make it sound so easy, frankly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't even have a clue on where to look.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's from flame Emperor SABO to the Kamabaka Queendom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We have to pinpoint the origin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's not using a white transponder snail to jam his call!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must be desperate, I doubt he'll speak for long!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's one of the eight nations that rebelled a few days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be an ideal place for SABO to seek refuge....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, I know I've caused you all a lot of trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: VE'RE SO GLAD TO HEAR YOU'RE SAFE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't the one who killed King cobra!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course not!! Perish the thought!! I totally had faith in you!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: We knew you were innocent, SABO-KUN....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Listen, when I was in Mary Geoise...

summary: This part advances the New Era After Wano through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
